docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ROBERT H. SLOSS RE CALCULATION OF INTEREST AS TO CONFESSION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCE COMPUTER TECHNOLOGY, INC., A CORPORATION
